items.title: Barcelona beat Bayern to reach Women's Champions League final
items.summary: Barcelona beat Bayern Munich 4-2 at the Nou Camp to win their semi-final tie 5-3 on aggregate to advance to the Women's Champions League final where they will face Lyon.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Azeez Al-Shaair goes from "broken" to near the top of the market at his position
items.summary: It's been quite a year for Texans linebacker Azeez Al-Shaair.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.
